message:
Simplify changelog system implementation

Refactor sync and generation to improve maintainability:
- Remove CHANGELOG_VENV infrastructure; use uvx directly
- Extract isDirectoryEntry helper to consolidate repeated logic
- Refactor functions to accept options objects
- Compute changelog paths dynamically instead of hardcoding
- Embed project icons directly in generated sidebar file
- Remove redundant icon merge logic from topics.ts
- Update astro config to import auto-generated changelogTopicPaths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
